overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a red sports car with active thrusters flying through the futuristic city of Night City. The vehicle transitions from street-level hovering to high-speed aerial navigation between skyscrapers, over water, and through narrow building corridors.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city street with construction zone

events.description: car accelerates and lifts off from street level, transitioning from hover to flight

agents.ego_description: red sports car with blue thrusters hovering just above the asphalt, then accelerating forward and taking off

entered.detail: large yellow tower crane visible above building line
tall modern building with curved reflective facade
tropical trees lining the street edge
yellow and black striped barriers along the road

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a red sports car hovering at street level in a futuristic city. The vehicle accelerates along a multi-lane road lined with palm trees and construction equipment, then lifts off the ground using thrusters. The camera follows from behind as the car transitions from ground driving to low-altitude flight.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal waterfront district viewed from air

events.description: car ascends above building rooftops, revealing expansive city view
vehicle flies over ocean water and coastal amusement area with ferris wheel

agents.ego_description: car gains significant altitude while flying over the urban landscape, then transitions to flying over the waterfront and ocean

entered.detail: expansive body of water visible beyond the coastline
large amusement ride structure on the waterfront
tall building with green-tinted glass facade

segments.scene_description: The car climbs high above the city streets, revealing a panoramic view of the urban skyline and coastline. It flies over the ocean water near a waterfront district featuring a large ferris wheel, then banks along the shore passing colorful high-rise buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense downtown skyscraper canyon with neon signage

events.description: car banks sharply left to navigate between closely spaced towers
enters extremely narrow gap between two massive skyscrapers

agents.ego_description: vehicle weaves aggressively between towering skyscrapers, making sharp lateral movements to avoid buildings while maintaining high speed

entered.detail: bright colorful commercial signage on building facades
futuristic train track structure running between buildings
distinctive round building with yellow and white horizontal stripes
enclosed walkway connecting two adjacent skyscrapers

segments.scene_description: Flying through the dense urban core, the car navigates a maze of glass and steel skyscrapers. Neon advertisements and elevated monorail tracks flash by as the vehicle banks sharply between buildings, including a distinctive yellow cylindrical tower and connecting skybridges.

scene_state.functional_zone: maintenance corridors and narrow gaps between high-rise buildings

events.description: car enters dark narrow vertical shaft between two buildings, temporarily blocking sky view
exits the dark shaft back into brighter daylight above a city street

agents.ego_description: car carefully maneuvers through extremely tight vertical corridors and maintenance shafts between buildings, then exits to fly above streets with monorail tracks

entered.detail: narrow dark corridor between two massive building structures
industrial maintenance platforms visible below the flight path
large commercial sign with 'COLA' text visible on building side
elevated train track running parallel to the street below

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a claustrophobic narrow shaft between skyscrapers, flying past metal maintenance walkways in dim lighting. It then emerges back into open air above a city street, flying beneath elevated monorail tracks and past large commercial billboards.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a red sports car transitions from street-level hovering to high-speed aerial navigation through a futuristic metropolis. It begins by accelerating along a multi-lane road lined with palm trees and construction equipment before lifting off the ground using thrusters to climb high above the city. As the vehicle ascends, the view expands into a panoramic skyline and coastline, gliding over ocean water and a waterfront district featuring a large ferris wheel. The scene then shifts into the dense urban core, where the car banks sharply between neon-lit skyscrapers, a yellow cylindrical tower, and elevated monorail tracks. Finally, the vehicle dives into a claustrophobic narrow shaft past dim maintenance walkways before emerging back into the open air beneath commercial billboards and transit lines.
